name: Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Available in health stores, kombu makes beans and peas more digestible. Combine all ingredients except salt and carrot.
2. Simmer until the barley is cooked, about 45 minutes.
3. Season to taste with salt if needed.
4. Garnish with shredded carrot if desired.
5. Note: Barley soup can be a soothing and digestible meal for convalescents. Omit the chicken to make it easier to eat. This soup is rich in protein, carbohydrates, and fiber.
